summary: Planned Phase 7 (Tier-1 Skill Migration) — 10 tasks: GraphFeedbackAdapter, feedback core enhancements (analyzeDiff, ChecklistBuilder, requestPeerReview), MCP tool wiring (entropy, validation, feedback), 7 Tier-1 skill SKILL.md updates.
pending: Task 2: Add graph types to core feedback
Task 3: Enhance analyzeDiff with graph impact data (TDD)
Task 4: Enhance ChecklistBuilder with graph harness checks (TDD)
Task 5: Enhance requestPeerReview with graph context
Task 6: Wire MCP validation and entropy tools to use graph
Task 7: Wire MCP feedback tools to use graph
Task 8: Update 7 Tier-1 skill SKILL.md files with graph notes
concerns: MCP tools use dynamic imports — graph loading must be lazy and handle missing graph gracefully
ChecklistBuilder harness checks are currently placeholders — graph data replaces them with real checks
Skill SKILL.md files are source files in agents/skills/ but installed from CLI dist — changes propagate on next build
decisions: GraphFeedbackAdapter computes impact data (affected tests/docs) and harness check data (violations/coverage)
analyzeDiff gets optional graphImpactData for graph-based test coverage detection
ChecklistBuilder.withHarnessChecks() gets optional graphData to replace placeholders with real results
requestPeerReview uses existing metadata passthrough — no signature change needed
MCP tools load graph via existing loadGraphStore utility — optional, falls back gracefully
All 7 Tier-1 skill SKILL.md files get graph-aware context gathering notes
